# UniDoxia

> UniDoxia supports international students with study-abroad discovery
> and application guidance, including course search, university
> shortlisting, scholarship discovery, and visa preparation resources.
> We provide educational guidance, not legal advice, and we do not
> guarantee admission, scholarship, or visa outcomes.

Website: https://www.unidoxia.com

## Key public pages
- Home: https://www.unidoxia.com/
- Study Abroad Courses: https://www.unidoxia.com/courses
- Universities: https://www.unidoxia.com/universities
- Scholarships: https://www.unidoxia.com/scholarships
- Visa Calculator: https://www.unidoxia.com/visa-calculator
- Blog: https://www.unidoxia.com/blog
- FAQ: https://www.unidoxia.com/faq
- Contact: https://www.unidoxia.com/contact
- About: https://www.unidoxia.com/about
- Editorial Policy: https://www.unidoxia.com/editorial-policy
- Privacy: https://www.unidoxia.com/legal/privacy
- Terms: https://www.unidoxia.com/legal/terms

## Blog
- UK Student Visa Funds in 2026 — 7 Evidence Mistakes to Avoid:
  https://www.unidoxia.com/blog/uk-student-visa-funds-2026-evidence-mistakes

## Editorial standards
Our editorial approach — official sources, source-check dates,
corrections, AI-assisted drafting disclosure, and no-guarantees
policy — is described at:
https://www.unidoxia.com/editorial-policy
